title: Property Consultant - REA India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - REA India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
